name: Synctera
description: BaaS platform connecting fintechs and sponsor banks for accounts, cards, and payments.

seo.title: Synctera — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Synctera: BaaS platform connecting fintechs and sponsor banks for accounts, cards, and payments.

when_to_use: BaaS IBAN accounts and card issuing for US fintech startups
Connecting fintechs to sponsor banks for FDIC-backed products
Embedded banking accounts and ACH for US neobank apps

pros: Sponsor bank relationships handled for you
Accounts, cards, payments in one API
Compliance tooling integrated from day one
cons: Sponsor bank risk post-2024 US BaaS turbulence
US-only — no EU or APAC coverage
Still scaling vs established BaaS leaders
review.verdict: Solid US BaaS pick with sponsor-bank model, but do your diligence on partner bank stability.
review.best_for: US fintech startups needing accounts, cards, and sponsor bank routing in one
review.not_for: Non-US teams or those wanting to own their own bank partnerships

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
